TestCase.Test_Case_Description: Write down the OS in the Description field
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: eg. Android

TestCase.Test_Case_Description: Write down the OS version in the Description field
Write down the firmware version in the Description field
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: eg. Base: M9615A-CEFWTAZM_4.0.111006 Kernel: 3.4.0 Build: L05E10d

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device 1 isn't paired with HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description:
1 Activate Bluetooth on Mobile Device. In order to be visible for other Bluetooth devices you have to enter the Bluetooth settings menu of your mobile device.
On HU press COM button on ZBE or go to Communication -> Manage mobile devices -> scroll down to Manage mobile devices -> select Connect new device. -> Select function Telephone. 2 On Mobile Device 1 select HU. 3 Confirm pairing request and all other requests that show up.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 HU can be found while Mobile Device 1 is searching for devices. 2 Bluetooth pairing request screen shows up on Mobile Device 1 and HU. PIN code shown on both sides are the same. 3 Mobile Device 1 is successfully paired as Hands-Free Device 1 and as Bluetooth-Audio Device.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device 1 (Test Device) is allready paired. Mobile Device 2 (other Device) isn't paired with HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description:
1 Activate Bluetooth on Mobile Device. In order to be visible for other Bluetooth devices you have to enter the Bluetooth settings menu of your mobile device.
On HU press COM button on ZBE or go to Communication -> Manage mobile devices -> scroll down to Manage mobile devices -> select Connect new device. -> Select function Telephone. 2 On Mobile Device 2 select HU. 3 Confirm pairing request and all othe requests that show up.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result:
1 HU can be found while Mobile Device 2 is searching for devices. 2 Bluetooth pairing request screen shows up on Mobile Device 2 and HU. PIN code shown on both sides are the same. 3 Mobile Device 2 is successfully paired as Hands-Free Device 2.
Mobile Device 1 is still paired as Hands-Free Device 1 and as Bluetooth-Audio Device.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device 1 isn't paired with HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description:
1 Activate Bluetooth on Mobile Device. In order to be visible for other Bluetooth devices you have to enter the Bluetooth settings menu of your mobile device.
On HU press COM button on ZBE or go to Communication -> Manage mobile devices -> scroll down to Manage mobile devices -> select Connect new device. -> Select function Telephone. 2 On Mobile Device 1 select HU. 3 Deny pairing on HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 HU can be found while Mobile Device 1 is searching for devices. 2 Bluetooth pairing request screen shows up on Mobile Device 1 and HU. PIN code shown on both sides are the same. HU remains stable. 3 Pairing process is terminated.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device 1 isn't paired with HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description:
1 Activate Bluetooth on Mobile Device. In order to be visible for other Bluetooth devices you have to enter the Bluetooth settings menu of your mobile device.
On HU press COM button on ZBE or go to Communication -> Manage mobile devices -> scroll down to Manage mobile devices -> select Connect new device. -> Select function Telephone. 2 On Mobile Device 1 select HU. 3 Deny pairing on Mobile Device 1.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 HU can be found while Mobile Device 1 is searching for devices. 2 Bluetooth pairing request screen shows up on Mobile Device 1 and HU. PIN code shown on both sides are the same. HU remains stable. 3 Pairing process is terminated.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device 1 isn't paired with HU Info: If Mobile Device and HU have been paired before, then delete Mobile Device on HU and HU on Mobile Device.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description:
1 Activate Bluetooth on Mobile Device. In order to be visible for other Bluetooth devices you have to enter the Bluetooth settings menu of your mobile device.
On HU press COM button on ZBE or go to Communication -> Manage mobile devices -> scroll down to Manage mobile devices -> select Connect new device. -> Select function Telephone. 2 On Mobile Device 1 select HU. 3 Wait for pairing timeout.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 HU can be found while Mobile Device 1 is searching for devices. 2 Bluetooth pairing request screen shows up on Mobile Device 1 and HU. PIN code shown on both sides are the same. HU remains stable. 3 Pairing process is terminated.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-7: On Tap - MD should connect or disconnect
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. CliIDCEvo on MD in HMI in order to connect or disconnect it
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. MD disconnects or connects to the bench

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-8: Delete Mobile Device on HU
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 On HU press COM button on ZBE or go to Communication -> Manage mobile devices -> scroll down to Manage mobile devices. 2 Select connected device and press center button of ZBE. Delete connected device.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Bluetooth connection is released. Mobile Device 1 is not listed in HU anymore. 3. Undo snaIDCEvobar should be displayer after cliIDCEvoing on remove option

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-9: Mobile Device Reconnect after Power Off
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Power Off Mobile Device while Bluetooth is ON. 2 Power On Mobile Device.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Bluetooth connection is released. 2 IDCEvo does not reconnect automatically.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-10: Mobile Device reconnect after Bluetooth Off
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Switch off Bluetooth on Mobile Device. 2 Switch on Bluetooth on Mobile Device.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Bluetooth connection is released. 2 IDCEvo does not reconnect automatically.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-11: HU reconnect after Power Off
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Power Off HU while Bluetooth is ON. For TestraIDCEvos and Testcases set mode Parken: "Parken_BN_IO". 2 Power on HU. For TestraIDCEvos and Testcases set mode Fahren: "Pruefen_Analyse_Diagnose".
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Bluetooth connection is released. 2 Bluetooth connection is re-established.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-12: HU reconnect after Bluetooth Off
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to Communication -> Select Manage mobile devices. or Press COM button on ZBE. 2 Scroll down to Settings and press ZBE. 3 Go to Bluetooth and uncheIDCEvo the cheIDCEvobox. 4 Wait 10 seconds. 5 CheIDCEvo the cheIDCEvobox Bluetooth.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result:
3 Bluetooth connection is released.
5 Bluetooth connection is re-established. Mobil Device 1 is reconnected as Hands-Free Device 1, Audio and Apps (in case device was paired with apps and supports app-feature)

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-13: Mobile Device out of range
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Put Mobile Device in shielding bag or shielding chamber or go out of range to simulate a linkloss 2 Get Mobile Device out of shielding bag or shielding chamber or go in range.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Bluetooth connection is released. 2 Bluetooth connection is re-established.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Observe connection stability during whole testing session.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 No link losses observed (except for linklosses that occured during regular test steps e.g. simulated link losses).

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download has started and is not finished. In case the download of the phonebook is already finished, then delete Mobile Device on HU
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Go to Communication. 2 Wait until synchronisation is finished (Synch animation cant be seen anymore).
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Phonebook download is started after pairing indicated by synchronisation animation. 2 All contacts from Mobile Device can be seen on HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-20: Incoming call during phonebook download
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download has started and is not finished. In case the download of the phonebook is already finished, then delete Mobile Device on HU
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Incoming call does not interrupt phonebook download.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-21: Outgoing call during phonebook download
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download has started and is not finished. In case the download of the phonebook is already finished, then delete Mobile Device on HU
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate call from Mobile Device 1 (paired Mobile Device) to Mobile Device 3 during phonebook download.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Outgoing call does not interrupt phonebook download.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download has started and is not finished. In case the download of the phonebook is already finished, then delete Mobile Device on HU
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Phonebook download is initiated and still running. Use a shielding bag or shielding chamber or go out of range to simulate a linkloss
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 After linkloss HU and Mobile Device cancel import and return to previous states.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-23: Audio playback during phonebook download
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download has started and is not finished. In case the download of the phonebook is already finished, then delete Mobile Device on HU
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 While phonebook is downloading start audio playbaIDCEvo from Mobile Device.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio playbaIDCEvo does not interrupt phonebook download.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download is finished. Sync animation can't be seen anymore. Contactbook has contacs with picture.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Go to Communication --> Contacts 2 CheIDCEvo if pictures are displayed correctly.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Contact picture of contacts are displayed correctly.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download is finished. Phonebook has contacts with special characters (e.g.: &, $,%, §, ä, ü, ö)
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 On IDCEvo go to Communication --> Contacts 2 Go to any contact with special characters in name or other fields.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 All special characters displayed correctly.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download is finished. A contact with blanks (some spaces between charakters) in contact details is stored in Phonebook.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Go to Communications --> Contacts 2 Go to a contact that has blanks in its contact details.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Blanks are displayed correctly.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 On HUgo to Communication --> Contacts 2 Go to a random address. CheIDCEvo all adress elements. 3 Start navigation to selected address.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Address elements (Street, street number, postal code, company) are displayed correctly. 3 Navigation to selected address is started.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download is finished. Phonebook has a contact with E-Mailaddress stored.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 On HU go to Communication --> Contacts. 2 PiIDCEvo a contact and scroll down until the E-Mailadress is visible.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 E-Mail address is displayed correcly.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download is finished. Phonebook has a contact with Web address stored.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 On HU go to Communication --> Contacts. 2 PiIDCEvo a contact and scroll to down to web address. CheIDCEvo web address.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Web address is displayed correcly.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download is finished. Mobile Device supports access to contacts that are stored on SIM card.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 On HU go to Communication --> Contacts. 2 CheIDCEvo if contacts that are stored on SIM card are visible.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 SIM contacts are visible.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download is finished. 2 contacts with same name and last name but 2 different telephone numbers.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 On HU go to Communication --> Contacts. 2 Scroll to contact with same name and last name. CheIDCEvo if the 2 different phone numbers are merged into one contact.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Contacts with the same name are merged.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download is finished. A contact with fax number.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 On HU go to Communication --> Contacts. 2 Select contact with fax number. CheIDCEvo if fax numbers are hidden.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Fax numbers are hidden.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Phonebook download is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Simple search for contact
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. Contact searched is displayed in HMI

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished. Some received calls are allready in call list.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to Communication --> Recent calls. 2 Scroll to Incoming. CheIDCEvo if all incoming calls are shown.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Received Calls are displayed correctly on HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished. Some dialed calls are allready in call list.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to Communication -> Recent calls. 2 Scroll to Outgoing. CheIDCEvo if all outgoing calls are shown.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 All outgoing calls are displayed.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished. Some missed calls are allready in call list.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to Communication -> Recent calls. 2 Scroll to Missed calls. CheIDCEvo if all missed calls are shown.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Missed Calls are displayed correctly on HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished. Some dialed, missed and received calls are allready in call list.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to Communication -> Recent calls 2 Scroll to Calls: All. CheIDCEvo if the combined call history is correct.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Combined Call History is displayed correctly on HU

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished. Some calls are listed in call list.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 CheIDCEvo if timestamps on Mobile Device and HU for call history are the same.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Timestamps are correct.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are paired. Mobile Device is connected as hands-free device (network indicator can be seen in the display of the HU). To simulate the linkloss a shielding bag or shielding chamber is recommended.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Put Mobile Device in shielding bag or shielding chamber. 2 Get Mobile Device out of shielding bag or shielding chamber. Wait a few seconds.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Bluetooth connection is released. 2 Bluetooth connection is re-established. Phone icon on display of HU is visible.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an outgoing call from Mobile Device 1(paired device) to Mobile Device 3.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 HU and Mobile Device 1 indicate outgoing call. Correct number or contact is displayed on HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an outgoing call from Mobile Device 1 to Mobile Device 3. 2 While call is setting up terminate the outgoing call.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 HU indicates set up of outgoing and hangup.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an outgoing call from Mobile Device 1 to Mobile Device 3. 2 Accept call on Mobile Device 3.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Call is active on Mobile Device and HU. Audio is transmitted in both directions.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an outgoing call from Mobile Device 1 to Mobile Device 3. 2 Accept call on Mobile Device 3. 3 Terminate call on HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 3 Call is terminated on Mobile Device and HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-43: Power off HU during outgoing call
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an outgoing call from Mobile Device 1 to Mobile Device 3. 2 Accept call on Mobile Device 3. 3 During an active outgoing call power off HU. For TestraIDCEvos and Testcases set mode Parken: "Parken_BN_IO".
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 3 Bluetooth connection released. Audio is still audible on Mobile Device (some implementations might hang up).

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-44: Power on HU during outgoing call
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are paired and not connected. HU is switched off (For TestraIDCEvos and Testcases set mode Parken: "Parken_BN_IO").
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an outgoing call from Mobile Device 1 to Mobile Device 3. 2 Accept call on Mobile Device 3. 3 During an active outgoing call power on HU. For TestraIDCEvos and Testcases set mode Fahren: "Pruefen_Analyse_Diagnose" (power on).
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 3 Bluetooth connection reestablished between HU to Mobile Device 1. Audio ist audible on HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an incoming call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1 (connected device).
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 HU and Mobile Device 1 indicate incoming call. Correct number or contact displayed. HU-Ringtone audible on HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-46: Power off HU during incoming call
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an incoming call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. 2 During an incoming call power off HU. For TestraIDCEvos and Testcases set mode Parken: "Parken_BN_IO".
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Bluetooth connection released. Incoming call is indicated on Mobile Device.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-199: Power on HU during incoming call
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are paired and not connected. HU is switched off (For TestraIDCEvos and Testcases set mode Parken: "Parken_BN_IO").
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an incoming call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. 2 During an incoming call power on HU. For TestraIDCEvos and Testcases set mode Fahren: "Pruefen_Analyse_Diagnose" (power on).
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Bluetooth connection is established. Call is transfered to HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an incoming call from MD3 to MD1 2 Reject incoming call on IDCEvo
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 IDCEvo and MD indicate the rejected call

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an incoming call from MD3 to MD1 2 Accept incoming call on IDCEvo
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Call is active on MD and IDCEvo. Audio is audible and transmitted in both directions

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-200: Power off HU during active call
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an incoming call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. 2 Power off HU during active call. For TestraIDCEvos and Testcases set mode Parken: "Parken_BN_IO".
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Bluetooth connection is released. Call is transfered to Mobile Device 1. Audio and voice are audible on Mobile Device 1 and Mobile Device 3.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an outgoing call from Mobile Device 1 to Mobile Device 3. 2 Accept call on Mobile Device 3. 3 During an active call navigate on HU to Keypad dialing and dial several numbers.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 3 CheIDCEvo if DTMF-Tone is audible on Mobile Device 3.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an incoming call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. 2 Accept call on HU. 3 During an active call mute microphone on Mobile Device 3.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 3 No audio is transmitted from Mobile Device 3 to HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an incoming call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. 2 Accept call on HU. 3 During an active call unmute microphone of Mobile Device 3.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: Audio is transmitted from Mobile Device 3 to HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-52: Mobile Device transfer audio to HU
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an incoming call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. 2 Accept call on HU.. 3 On Mobile Device 1 (connected device) navigate to change speaker and transfer audio to Mobile Device speaker. 4 On Mobile Device 1 (connected device) navigate to change speaker and transfer audio to HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 3 Audio is only audible on Mobile Device 1. 4 Audio is only audible on HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-53: HU transfer audio to Mobile Device
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an incoming call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. 2 Accept call on HU. 3 On HU Menue in active call transfer audio to Mobile device 1.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 3 Audio is only audible on Mobile Device 1.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-287: Mobile Device transfer call to HU in new Lifecycle
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are paired. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Power off HU. For TestraIDCEvos and Testcases set mode Parken: "Parken_BN_IO". 2 Wait until Head Unit sleeps. 3 Initiate call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. 4 With ongoing call power on HU. For TestraIDCEvos and Testcases set mode Fahren: "Pruefen_Analyse_Diagnose".
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Head Unit sleeps. 3 Call audio is audible on Mobile Device 1. 4 After a couple of seconds call audio should be transfered to HU. Audio should be audible on both sides.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate an incoming call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. 2 Accept call on HU. 3 End call on HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 3 Call is terminated on HU and Mobile Device 1.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished. It is possible that the call waiting option is disabled for some SIM-cards. It is recommended to cheIDCEvo if this option is enabled. The status can be cheIDCEvoed by dialing the MMI code *#43#.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate a call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. 2 Accept call on HU. 3 Initiate a call from Mobile Device 4 to Mobile Device 1.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 1st call from Mobile Device 3 is active. 3 2nd call from Mobile Device 4 is incoming and Number is displayed. Call waiting tone is hearable and Accept/Reject is possible.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate a call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. 2 Accept call from Mobile Device 3 on HU. 3 Initiate a call from Mobile Device 4 to Mobile Device 1. 4 Accept call from Mobile Device 4 on HU. 5 Switch between both calls a few times.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 4 1st call from Mobile Device 3 is on hold. 2nd call from Mobile Device 4 active. 5 1st call from Mobile Device 3 is active. 2nd call from Mobile Device 4 is on hold.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device 1 and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate a call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. 2 Accept call from Mobile Device 3 on HU. 3 Initiate a call from Mobile Device 4 to Mobile Device 1. 4 Accept call from Mobile Device 4 on HU. IDCEvo: 5 Navigate to Conference Call and establish conference call. MGU22: 5 Press Conference Call from Mobile Device 1 to establish conference call.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 1st call from Mobile Device 3 is on hold. 2nd call from Mobile Device 4 active. 2 After the merge conference call is active, both incoming calls from Mobile Device 3 and Mobile Device 4 are audible on HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 CheIDCEvo the signal strength indicator in the upper right corner of the display of HU. Compare with strength shown on Mobile Device.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Correct fieldstrength is shown on HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished. This test can only be done with foreign SIM-cards or when testing abroad with a foreign SIM-card. In case this testcase cant be tested, set status to "NTB".
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 CheIDCEvo if the roaming indicator in the upper right corner of the display of HU is visible.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 HU indicates roaming.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device is connected as audio device (audio icon can be seen in the display of the HU). To simulate the linkloss a shielding bag or shielding chamber is recommended.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Put Mobile Device in shielding bag or shielding chamber. 2 Get Mobile Device out of shielding bag or shielding chamber. Wait a few seconds.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Bluetooth connection is released. 2 Bluetooth connection is re-established. Audio icon is visible on the display of the HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished. Music is stored on internal memory of the device.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Play music from internal memory of Mobile Device 1 (connected device)
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Music is transmitted to HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished. Mobile Device supports SD-Card. Music is stored on SD-Card. In case the tested Mobile Device does not support SD-Cards set this testcase to status "NTB".
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Play music from external memory (SD-Card) of Mobile Device 1 (paired device).
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Music is transmitted to HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. To simulate the linkloss a shielding bag or shielding chamber is recommended.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Play music on Mobile Device 1. 2 Put Mobile Device in shielding bag or shielding chamber. 3 Wait 15 seconds and then get Mobile Device out of shielding bag or shielding chamber. Wait a few seconds.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Bluetooth connection is released. 3 Bluetooth connection is re-established. Audio is playing.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-66: Reconnect as inactive audio source
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. To simulate the linkloss a shielding bag or shielding chamber is recommended.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Play music on Mobile Device 1. 2 On HU switch from audio playbaIDCEvo to Radio. 3 Put Mobile Device in shielding bag or shielding chamber. 4 Wait 15 seconds and then get Mobile Device out of shielding bag or shielding chamber. Wait a few seconds.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Radio is playing. 3 Bluetooth connection is released. 4 Bluetooth connection is re-established. Radio is playing and audio playbaIDCEvo is inactive source.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-67: Start player during active call
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Initiate call from HU to Mobile Device 3. 2 Accept call on Mobile Device 3. 3 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on HU during an active call.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 3 Ongoing call is not interrupted. Play status does not change to "playing". A2DP audio is still muted on Mobile Device 1. Audio playbaIDCEvo resumes correctly after ending the call.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on Mobile Device 1.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on Mobile Device 1. 2 Pause audio playbaIDCEvo on Mobile Device 1.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on Mobile Device 1. 2 Audio playbaIDCEvo is paused in HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on Mobile Device 1. 2 Skip audio playbaIDCEvo forward on Mobile Device 1. 3 Skip audio playbaIDCEvo baIDCEvowards on Mobile Device 1.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU. 2 HU skips to next song. 3 HU skips to previous song (or beginning of current song).

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on Mobile Device 1. 2 Press fast forward on Mobile Device 1. 3 Press fast baIDCEvowards on Mobile Device 1.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU. 2 HU winds forwards. 3 HU rewinds.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU. HU displays current playing position.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description:
1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on HU. 2 Pause audio playbaIDCEvo on HU.
Note: For MGU22 in order to pause you need to press the Volume Icon in the top right corner.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU. 2 Audio playbaIDCEvo is paused on Mobile Device 1.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on HU. 2 Skip audio playbaIDCEvo forward on HU. 3 Skip audio playbaIDCEvo baIDCEvowards on HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU. 2. Mobile Device 1 skips to next song. 3. Mobile Device 1 skips to previous song (or beginning of current song).

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on Mobile Device 1. IDCEvo: 2 Press fast forward on HU. 3 Press fast baIDCEvowards on HU. MGU22: On PlaybaIDCEvo bar in right side a square should be present. 2 Drag square to the right to fast forward on HU. 3 Drag square to the left to fast baIDCEvowards on HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU. 2 Mobile Device 1 winds forwards. 3 Mobile Device 1 rewinds.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on Mobile Device 1. 2 CheIDCEvo if name of the current traIDCEvo is shown.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU. 2 HU displays correct song title.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on Mobile Device 1. 2 CheIDCEvo if name of the current album is shown.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU. 2 HU displays correct album name.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on Mobile Device 1. 2 CheIDCEvo if name of the current artist is shown.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU. HU displays correct artist name.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on Mobile Device 1. 2 On the lower right of the display the status bar should be visible. In there on the left side the elapsed time should be seen. On the right side the remaining playtime should be seen.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result:
1 Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU. 2 HU displays correct playing time.
Note: For MGU22: If an Carplay device is connected both elapsed and remaining time will be displayed. If an Android device is connected only elapsed time will be displayed.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start playing music on Mobile Device. 2 Initiate an incoming call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. 3 End call.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU. 2 Audio playbaIDCEvo is paused and/or song is muted. 3 Audio playbaIDCEvo resumes.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device (only for iOS supported) and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start playing music on Mobile Device from an album with cover art. 2 CheIDCEvo if the cover art is dislayed correctly.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU. 2 HU displays cover art.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to music search. 2 Enter the name of a traIDCEvo or artist in the search field.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Searching troughout Title, Artist, Genre and Albums is possible.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to media search. 2 Go to Titles.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 All traIDCEvo titles should be listed and can be searched.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to media search. 2 Go to Artists.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 All artists should be listed and can be searched.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to media search. 2 Go to Genres.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 All genres should be listed and can be searched.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to media search. 2 Go to Albums.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 All albums should be listed and can be searched.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to media search. 2 Go to Playlists.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 All playlists should be listed and can be searched.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on Mobile Device 1. 2 Activate shuffle mode on Mobile Device 1. 3 Skip to next traIDCEvo.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Correct shuffle mode. 3 TraIDCEvos are played in random order.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo on Mobile Device 1. 2 Navigate to Shuffle and activate shuffle mode. 3 Skip to next traIDCEvo.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 3 TraIDCEvos are played in random order.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished. It is possible that the SMS option is disabled for some SIM-cards. It is recommended to cheIDCEvo if this option is enabled. The status can be cheIDCEvoed by dialing the MMI code *221#.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Go to Communication. CheIDCEvo if Message menu item is visible.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Message menu item is visible.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to Communication -> Messaging
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Received SMS are shown on the HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Send a SMS from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1 (connected device).
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 SMS can be received and is visible in the display of HU. Indicator for new Message shows up.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to Communication -> Messaging. 2 CheIDCEvo if timestamps of downloaded messages that are shown on the HU and on Mobile Device 1 are the same.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 2 Timestamp is correct.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to Communication -> Messaging. 2 Open a SMS. 3 Navigate to Delete SMS. 4 Delete the selected SMS.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 4 The SMS is deleted on HU and on Mobile Device 1.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Navigate to Communication -> Messaging. 2 Open an SMS. 3 Navigate to Forward SMS. 4 Forward the selected SMS to Mobile Device 3.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 4 SMS is forwarded to Mobile Device 3 and visible on Mobile Device 3.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected. Synchronisation is finished. Mobile Device has voice assistant (Siri, Bixby, Google Now etc.) installed.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Activate assistant by long pressing the voice button on the MFL (Multifunktionslenkrad/multifunction steering wheel) 2 Ask assistant any question. 3 Deactivate assistant by pressing the voice button on the MFL (Multifunktionslenkrad/multifunction steering wheel).
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Assistant can be activated while Mobile Device 1 is connected. Voice assistant dialogue can be seen. 2 Voice assistant is reacting on the voice command. 3 Voice dialogue screen is terminated.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: HU can provide a WIFI-Hotspot. If the HU doesnt support this feature set status to "NTB".
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 On HU navigate to Commuication -> Manage mobile device -> Connect new device -> WIFI. 2 Turn on WIFI on Mobile Device 1. 3 Connect to hotspot provided by HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 WIFI Hotspot and passphrase is provided. 2 Possible WIFI-Connections on Mobile Device 1 are shown. 3 Mobile Device 1 can be connected to HU WIFI-Hotspot.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Connection via WIFI is established.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Turn off WIFI on Mobile Device 1. 2 Wait 15 seconds. 3 Turn on WIFI on Mobile Device 1. 4 Turn off WIFI-Hotspot on HU. 5 Wait 15 seconds. 6 Turn on WIFI-Hotspot on HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Connection via WIFI is lost. 2 3 Mobile Device 1 reconnects with WIFI-Hotspot. 4 Connection via WIFI is lost. 5 6 Mobile Device 1 reconnects with WIFI-Hotspot.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: CarPlay is supported by Mobile Device (Apple only).
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Activate Bluetooth and WIFI on Mobile Device 1. 2 On HU navigate to Communication -> Manage mobile devices. 3 Choose Mobile Device 1 and connect Apple CarPlay. Follow instructions shown on Mobile Device 1 and HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 3 CarPlay connects with HU.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: CarPlay is supported by Mobile Device (Apple only). CarPlay connection is established between Mobile Device and HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Start audio playbaIDCEvo and wait for traffic announcement.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio playbaIDCEvo stop or pause during TA, and resumes to play after the TA interruption.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: CarPlay is supported by Mobile Device (Apple only). CarPlay connection is established between Mobile Device and HU.
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1 Go to "Itunes" in CarPlay Menu and start play audio. 2 Go to "Podcasts" in CarPlay Menu and start audio. 3 Try other audio you find and start play audio.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1 Audio in iTunes is hearable and without interruptions. 2 Audio in Podcast is hearable and without interruptions. 3 Audio is hearable and without interruptions.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Carplay connected Music playing via Carplay
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Receive a phonecall on Carplay while music is playing
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. Phonecall sound should be hearable

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: Carplay connected
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Start playing music via Carplay
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. Music should be hearable

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. MGU, RAM ready 2. Carplay device ready to be connected
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Start connecting device as Carplay source
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. Carplay interface should be available

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: MGU, RAM both flashed and ready Vehicle speed 0
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: Start Android Auto audio Source
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. Android auto source hearable and volume is adjustable

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-201: Connect Android Auto device from Device Menu
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. ANdroid auto functionality is enabled on the system 3. Android auto support system setting is enabled
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Open HU pairing menu and add new device 2. Connect AndroidPhone as AndroidAuto source on target 3. Accept Android Auto disclaimer in the HMI and on the MD
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. Android auto activated and interface is shown

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-202: Disconnect Android Auto device while multiple MDs are connected
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto 4. Other MDs are paired to the system
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Disconnect Android auto device
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. The system disconnects Android auto device from HU 2. Reconnection is happening for a paired MD only if an empty slot is free, for the same profile.

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-203: Automatic Reconnection for Android Auto device after LC
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Perform a LC on bench/vehicle
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. Reconnection is happening for AndroidAuto device, with previous configuration

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-204: Phonecall while in Android Auto
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Perform a phonecall while in AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. Phonecall is the main audio source 2. Phonecall is hearable 3. Music is paused while in phonecall

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Navigate through AndroidAuto interface
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. Navigation through menus is possible, smooth and no crashes are observed.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Activate in GoogleMaps guidance 2. Attempt quiIDCEvo turn-by-turn instructions successions by pressing Google Maps UI
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on AAP navigation source.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Play music from internal storage or via 3rd Party app.
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on AAP entertainment source

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Trigger Google Assistant session 2. Cancel at midway + quiIDCEvo start/stop session
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on AAP speech source

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Start playing music via AAP entertainment source 2. Start AAP guidance
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on AAP on ent source 2. HU duIDCEvos AAP ent source when AAP guidance is hearable

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Start playing music via AAP entertainment source 2. Trigger AAP speech
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on AAP on ent source 2. HU pauses AAP audio source and plays assistant. Audio resumes after assistant ended

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Start playing music via AAP entertainment source 2. Start AAP guidance 3. Trigger an AAP speech assistant
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on AAP on ent source 2. HU overlayes audio and navigation source 3. AAP entertainment source is paused during assistant and AAP navigation audio is terminated. AAP ent resumes after assistant ends.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Start playing music via AAP entertainment source 2. Press Mute button on volume control knob
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on AAP on ent source 2. HU mutes AAP ent source playing. At unmute, AAP source resumes and is hearable.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Start playing music via AAP entertainment source 2. Start AAP guidance 3. Mute system
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on AAP on ent source 2. AAP ent source is overlayed by AAP navigation source 3. When Muted AAP ent source pauses and AAP navigation pauses or it's terminated. 4. When Unmuted, AAP ent source resumes and AAP navi resumes(if unmute happens immediatly after mute), or it's heard in the next AAP navi annoucement

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Start playing music via AAP entertainment source 2. Start AAP assistance 3. Mute system
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on AAP on ent source 2. AAP ent source is paused during AAP assistant - blip sound is heard and assistant is active. 3. After assistant is terminated, AAP ent is resumed.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Start playing music via AAP entertainment source 2. Start Native assistant
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on AAP on ent source 2. AAP ent source is paused during native assistant 3. After native assistant is ended, AAP ent source is resumed.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Start playing music via AAP entertainment source 2. Start Native navigation
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on AAP on ent source 2.HU plays ent source with duIDCEvoing done with device not by HU, and HU plays navi annoucements as overlay

TestCase.Test_Case_Name: CEC-217: AAP_media + AAP navigation + Native assistant
TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Start playing music via AAP entertainment source 2. Start AAP navigation 3. Trigger Native assistant
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on AAP on ent source 2.HU plays ent source with duIDCEvoing done with device not by HU, and HU plays navi annoucements as overlay 3. When Native assistant is triggered, AAP ent is paused, and AAP navi annoucements is ended or mixed with assistant. AAP Ent is resumed after native assistant is ended.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Start playing music via native media player 2. Start AAP navigation
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on native media 2. Navi annoucements and native media are overlayed.

TestCase.Test_Case_Precondition: 1. BT, Wifi active on HU 2. Android auto functionality is enabled 3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
TestCase.Test_Case_Description: 1. Start playing music via native media player 2. Start AAP assistant
TestCase.Test_Case_Expected_Result: 1. HU plays audio on native media 2. AAP assitant pauses native media, and is resumed after AAP assistant is ended.
